pages.text:
i er

NOs E/FC/66

The Xiniatry of Foreign Affairs prosents its complimente to the Frenon Bubanay in art banka and with referenoe to the

Babasey Note Nos 157/Au dated iet October 1980 enclosing a letter addressed to Hon. A Gos. Hameed, Ministor of Foreign Affairs in

I'i Lanka by the french Moreign Minister Ho Io Is. Peanooia-Ponoat, has the honour to ackrowledge reoeipt of this commnication.

The Ministry of foreign Affairs avaiis itself of this opportunity to renew to the french imbassy in sri Lanka the assurane of its highest consideration.

ARIBASSADE DE FRAN::

ARxIVEE 2： 7.1008.

N

i dre... 179)

Classement. A Ant..

colombo, 3rd Datober, 1980

The French Embassy, colombo.

5g sees.
